title: Miyung Buster
compiled_truth: Miyung Buster is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-26 to 2001-10-17), Miyung Buster sent 172 and received 185 emails, totalling 357 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (165), [Filuntz](people/filuntz-aol) (159), [Nicholas O'Day](people/nicholas-o-day) (151), [Mike Dahlke](people/mike-dahlke) (114), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (110).
